decisions.title: Prioritize E2 GA blockers vs. platform stability
decisions.context: Multiple E2 issues surfacing (ENG-9717 sharelinks, ENG-10024 UI lockup, ENG-9818 panel config) alongside critical performance work (ENG-10037 5M pts/sec target). Need to decide investment split.

arguments.for: E2 GA critical for 'Embed Deeper' pillar - delays risk customer adoption and Decisions Captured metric
arguments.against: Platform instability (ENG-10047 unusable pages, ENG-10039 ABAC issues) undermines 'Nail the Core' and existing customer trust

decisions.title: Client-side parsing strategy for detect_configs
decisions.context: ENG-9968 (HDF5) and ENG-9969 (CH10) propose client-side parsing. Architectural decision affects Canvas performance, Python Rules integration, and edge compute strategy.

arguments.for: Reduces backend load, enables offline Canvas use (Sift Edge alignment), faster iteration for data scientists
arguments.against: Increases bundle size, browser compatibility risks, harder to maintain parsing logic across client/server

decisions.title: Consolidate log scaling implementations
decisions.context: Duplicate work: ENG-9492 and ENG-9868 both implementing Y-axis log scaling. Coordination failure or intentional parallel paths?
decisions.blockedBy: Need clarity on whether these are different chart types or duplicated effort

arguments.for: Eliminate waste, single implementation easier to test and maintain
arguments.against: May be intentional for different chart contexts (Explore vs Canvas)

decisions.title: ABAC authorization scope and timeline
decisions.context: ENG-9761 (collections), ENG-10039 (archived resources bug) - ABAC rollout is 'Build the Moat' but causing production issues. Accelerate or pause?

arguments.for: ABAC essential for enterprise customers, competitive moat, continue aggressive rollout
arguments.against: Bugs in production undermine trust, pause new scope until core cases stabilized

decisions.title: Internal MCP server investment justification
decisions.context: ENG-9296 building internal MCP server. How does this align with Signal>Evidence>Decision workflow and Decisions Captured metric?

arguments.for: MCP enables Ask SIFT improvements, better AI-human collaboration in decision-making (strategic bet)
arguments.against: Unclear ROI, diverts from core product work, speculative technology investment

timeAudit.weekSummary: High coordination load: ABAC rollout sync, E2 GA war room, client-side parsing design review consuming bandwidth.
alerts: Only 2 focus blocks scheduled today - insufficient for strategic thinking
Three 1:1s today suggests reactive escalation pattern vs. proactive planning
